query: SELECT id, title, LEFT(generatedContent, 4000) as html_preview FROM proposals WHERE generatedContent LIKE '<!%' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user FeC7Hhjo94vzeQP.root --database TxoyTEEFMfksnn9C3wscL4 --execute SELECT id, title, LEFT(generatedContent, 4000) as html_preview FROM proposals WHERE generatedContent LIKE '<!%' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1;
messages: <title>HVAC System Replacement Proposal — John Smith | Mingkai Liu</title>
